name: printcalc
description: PrintCalc – WPF desktop + Next.js web + ASP.NET API

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web:wait"
scripts.dev:web:wait: wait-on -t 120000 http-get://127.0.0.1:5281/api/health && npm run dev --prefix web
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run start:web:wait"
scripts.start:web:wait: wait-on -t 120000 http-get://127.0.0.1:5281/api/health && npm run start --prefix web
